records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, the villagers took down a C.O. without being Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, the villagers took down a C.O. without being Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, the villagers took down a C.O. without being Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-Ciringrad is a village founded by people exiled from the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-Ciringrad is a village founded by people exiled from the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-Ciringrad is a village founded by people exiled from the Northern Union.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Given the Union's technology and the villagers' unity... l-low-level C.O.s shouldn't be a problem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Given the Union's technology and the villagers' unity... l-low-level C.O.s shouldn't be a problem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Given the Union's technology and the villagers' unity... l-low-level C.O.s shouldn't be a problem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good thing we weren't late.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good thing we weren't late.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good thing we weren't late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: These roads are too rough for two young girls. You should head back now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: These roads are too rough for two young girls. You should head back now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: These roads are too rough for two young girls. You should head back now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Why are my feet like this all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Why are my feet like this all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Why are my feet like this all of a sudden?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, must be these heels. Maybe I got a blister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, must be these heels. Maybe I got a blister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, must be these heels. Maybe I got a blister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there a village nearby where I could rest or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there a village nearby where I could rest or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there a village nearby where I could rest or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have no Eternium shield on you. So you're a Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have no Eternium shield on you. So you're a Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have no Eternium shield on you. So you're a Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait. Are you really pointing a gun at a lovely lady like me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait. Are you really pointing a gun at a lovely lady like me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait. Are you really pointing a gun at a lovely lady like me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't joke. No ordinary woman strolls a Corrupted Area dressed like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't joke. No ordinary woman strolls a Corrupted Area dressed like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't joke. No ordinary woman strolls a Corrupted Area dressed like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that saw of yours. Seeing how the teeth are freshly set, it is used for combat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that saw of yours. Seeing how the teeth are freshly set, it is used for combat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that saw of yours. Seeing how the teeth are freshly set, it is used for combat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh. As expected, lots of hostility toward outsiders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh. As expected, lots of hostility toward outsiders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh. As expected, lots of hostility toward outsiders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Should I say I'm with the Chamber Administration?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Should I say I'm with the Chamber Administration?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Should I say I'm with the Chamber Administration?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-in a village that is basically exile, there won't be many who like the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-in a village that is basically exile, there won't be many who like the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-in a village that is basically exile, there won't be many who like the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They won't touch us outright... but they won't let us in either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They won't touch us outright... but they won't let us in either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They won't touch us outright... but they won't let us in either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not saying we just leave, are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not saying we just leave, are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not saying we just leave, are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. If they only distrust outsiders, we just need a reason they can't ignore us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. If they only distrust outsiders, we just need a reason they can't ignore us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. If they only distrust outsiders, we just need a reason they can't ignore us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-for example...
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-for example...
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-for example...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is it suddenly doing tricks in front of everyone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is it suddenly doing tricks in front of everyone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is it suddenly doing tricks in front of everyone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffox was made with techniques Ms. Yulia taught me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffox was made with techniques Ms. Yulia taught me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffox was made with techniques Ms. Yulia taught me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If a resident in Ciringrad recognizes the Northern Union's technology... th-they will recognize it at a glance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If a resident in Ciringrad recognizes the Northern Union's technology... th-they will recognize it at a glance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If a resident in Ciringrad recognizes the Northern Union's technology... th-they will recognize it at a glance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One question.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One question.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One question.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is your relationship with the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is your relationship with the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is your relationship with the Northern Union?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our relationship with the Northern Union? Well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our relationship with the Northern Union? Well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our relationship with the Northern Union? Well...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Natalia, you're not going to
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Natalia, you're not going to
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Natalia, you're not going to
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: L-long live the Northern Union!
records.m_Talk_DEU: L-long live the Northern Union!
records.m_Talk_FRA: L-long live the Northern Union!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Under Chief of the General Staff Felix, the Northern Union is the most excellent organization in the world, and science can prove it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Under Chief of the General Staff Felix, the Northern Union is the most excellent organization in the world, and science can prove it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Under Chief of the General Staff Felix, the Northern Union is the most excellent organization in the world, and science can prove it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected, the Northern army...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected, the Northern army...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected, the Northern army...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They must be here to take revenge for the Matryoshka incident! Seize them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They must be here to take revenge for the Matryoshka incident! Seize them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They must be here to take revenge for the Matryoshka incident! Seize them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ahaha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ahaha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ahaha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was dumb to think claiming Northern Union affiliation would help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was dumb to think claiming Northern Union affiliation would help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was dumb to think claiming Northern Union affiliation would help.
